description: New client welcome and onboarding activation.
subject: Welcome {{client_name}} — your onboarding starts now

body_sections.content: Welcome in. I'm glad you're here.
If anything feels stuck, reply to this email or text me at {{support_number}}. I monitor it personally.

local_champion.avatar_next_steps: 1. I'll call you in the next 24 hours to set up your lead response system. 2. You'll get a text with the setup link. 3. First week we track booked jobs vs. previous baseline.
local_champion.first_value_24h: Within 24 hours your missed-call text-back is active — every unanswered call gets a polite text with your booking link.
local_champion.avatar_cta: What's the best number to call you on this week?

solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_next_steps: 1. 45-min kickoff to map your current leverage gaps. 2. Week 1 install of the productization workspace. 3. Week 2-4 layered in systems.
solo_strategic_consultant.first_value_24h: Your workspace is provisioned. Calendar link coming in a separate email.

boutique_agency_founder.avatar_next_steps: 1. Delivery audit call with you and your ops lead. 2. Week 1 playbook selection. 3. Weeks 2-6 rollout across chosen service line.
boutique_agency_founder.first_value_24h: Audit prep doc is attached — fill in the 6 questions before the call.

fractional_executive.avatar_next_steps: 1. Per-client vault provisioning. 2. Context ingest pipeline wired. 3. 90-min pairing session to load your top 2 engagements.
fractional_executive.first_value_24h: Your sovereign workspace is ready. Ingest instructions in a separate message.

technical_founder_operator.avatar_next_steps: 1. Repo access granted. 2. Install doc + reference config delivered. 3. Optional 60-min pairing if you want a second set of eyes.
technical_founder_operator.first_value_24h: Repo access is live. Start with the README and the /examples directory.

solo_operator.avatar_next_steps: 1. Template pack delivered. 2. 30-min async setup video. 3. First value in day 1.
solo_operator.first_value_24h: Template pack is in the attachment. Watch the 8-min setup video first.
solo_operator.avatar_cta: Stuck anywhere? Reply to this email.

agency_builder.avatar_next_steps: 1. Leadership walkthrough with you + ops partner. 2. Weeks 1-6 phased rollout. 3. Weekly margin-delta review.
agency_builder.first_value_24h: Leadership walkthrough deck attached. Schedule the call via the link.

creative_hustler.avatar_next_steps: 1. Resonance tracker wired to your primary platforms. 2. Weekly 'what's working' report activated. 3. Creator community access.
creative_hustler.first_value_24h: Your resonance tracker is live and collecting baseline data.
